channel.title: funny on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in funny on Have an average day :|

item.title: Poking fun at Linux Gaming
item.description: So I see this post on Reddit and thought it was pretty funny. I didn’t laugh till I saw the top comment though. AbaddonSF: This must be the Ubuntu version, Slack or gentoo, would be a log, and some copper ore. Hypersapien: A log? Pfft. You want all the work done for you? Try an acorn. You’ll need iron ore and coal as well to make the steel tools to cut the tree down when it grows and shape the wood.

item.title: So Avriel got scared ...
item.description: So Avriel got scared by a puppy and came streaking across the cul-de-sac like a little pink bullet. So she learned not to run from dogs. ^_^

item.title: So, Jules just learned ...
item.description: So, Julesl just learned the lesson that jumping into a glass door won’t take you to Narnia. ^_^

item.title: Nerds have...
item.description: I love this picture. Now where can I get that shirt. I know someone I’d like to give that too.

item.title: Stairs and I have a hostile relationship.
item.description: Hmm I have the same relationship with stairs.

item.title: Wait, that's not the GROWL I'm looking for....
item.description: So I’m looking for Growl for Android and I ended up finding GROWLr: Gay Bears Near You. Not my cup of tea, but It’s an interesting app.

item.title: Aww what a cute dog & cat
item.description: Kind of NSFW… but really funny. – http://www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/Erekw.jpg viaReddit.

item.title: Well, that's awkward....
item.description: As a bagpiper, I play many gigs. Recently I was asked by a funeral director to play at a grave-side service for a homeless man. He had no family or friends, so the service was to be at a pauper&# 146;s cemetery in the Ohio back-country. As I was not familiar with the backwoods, I got lost; and being a typical male I didn&# 146;t stop for directions. I finally arrived an hour late and saw the funeral guy had evidently gone and the hearse was nowhere in sight.

item.title: Happy Birthday?
item.description: So we get to the door and the boy strips nude while tossing his clothes into the air yelling Happy Birthday; all before the door got unlocked. One day this is going to be a source of great amusement. Posted from WordPress for Android

item.title: Been a while since I had a good laugh at a starwars meme... http://redd.it/qubox
item.description: Been a while since I had a good laugh at a starwars meme… http://redd.it/qubox

item.title: This is a classy gun!
item.description: Then I saw this picture and promptly laughed my ass off. I love Reddit.

item.title: On Blogging
item.description: aardvark-g203: (From Bhuvan T./29/M/Bengaluru,India) How can i make my blog famous? (Type ‘pass’ to skip, or ‘more’ for extra options.) me: you need to do a blog on ninja, pirates, cute furry things, or rub your servers in yak blood. aardvark-g203: Great — I’ve sent that to Bhuvan. Thanks for the fast answer! (Type ‘Bhuvan:’ followed by a message to add something, or ‘more’ for options.

item.title: The Desitin Incident.
item.description: I get a call at work this morning…. Iruma: Your son just ate and an entire tube of desitin. Me: ….. Iruma: hehe Me: Did you call poison control? Iruma: Yes (still laughing) Me: AND!? Iruma: He’ll be fine and might have an upset stomach. You need to fix the baby gate. Me: AGAIN!?

item.title: FIND THAT SMELL!
item.description: Ok kiddies its time for another game! Xan woke up from his nap and played SHAKE THAT DIAPER!!!! So for round two we get to play FIND THAT SMELL!!! Sometimes I wish I could just write a shell script to take care of that. I&# 146;m pretty sure I could do it in perl&# 133; /facepalm
